scripts.build: cd app && npm install && npm run build
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others --names "worker,app" --prefix-colors "cyan,green" "cd worker && npx wrangler dev --remote" "cd app && npm run dev"
scripts.seed:reset: cd worker && npx wrangler d1 execute morechard-dev --remote --file=dev/seeds/_reset.sql
scripts.seed:base: cd worker && npx wrangler d1 execute morechard-dev --remote --file=dev/seeds/_base.sql
scripts.seed:m2: cd worker && npx wrangler d1 execute morechard-dev --remote --file=dev/seeds/_reset.sql && npx wrangler d1 execute morechard-dev --remote --file=dev/seeds/_base.sql && npx wrangler d1 execute morechard-dev --remote --file=dev/seeds/state-m2.sql
